final_decision.exact_quote: 1. In your IdP, assign yourself to a group with the correct prefix that maps to an Admin or Owner role.
final_decision.response: To restore your access, you will need to contact another Admin or Owner of your organization. They can follow these steps: 1. Navigate to Organization settings > Organization (for Claude) or Settings > Members (for Console). 2. Change your role back to Admin or Owner. Alternatively, if you have access to your Identity Provider (IdP), you can assign yourself to a group with the correct prefix that maps to an Admin or Owner role, and then log out and log back in to regain access.

input.Issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
input.Subject: Claude access lost
